default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and AfterShoot teams to discuss content strategy, operational changes, and upcoming priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has transitioned to a new internal platform (Atlas) for improved content operations and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [New team members introduced: Darrell (GrowthX) and Ehtisham (growthx.ai) joining AfterShoot account](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [AfterShoot team identified declining keyword rankings as a key area for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Collaboration on updating content strategy, including cluster approach and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Operational Updates

  - [Launched Atlas, an internal platform for content operations](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [Allows more control over output and constant learning](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Improves quality across clients](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Enables expansion beyond blogs and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Developing new dashboards and operational improvements](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Directors meeting to refine content creation process and ICP understanding](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Team Transitions and Introductions

  - [Darrell Etherington joining from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Background: 12 years at TechCrunch, journalism and photography experience](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [Relevant experience with tools similar to AfterShoot's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Ehtisham Hussain joining from growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [13+ years in content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Experience in both agency and in-house roles](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Proposed cluster strategy approach for content](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Atlas system demonstration planned for future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Revisiting and refreshing content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Shifting focus from product-specific content to more top-of-funnel pieces](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Addressing basic SEO issues: increasing keywords in top positions](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Meenakshi (AfterShoot) working on audits and cluster mapping](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

### Collaboration and Workflow

  - [AfterShoot team to share internal research and Q3 strategy](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Focus on three main branches:](https://fathom.video/share/tLUACWTPe_rfyWjeo6jcQzZzdDLLLPqf?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
    1.  On-page optimizations
    2.  LLM-side improvements
    3.  Enhancing visitor journeys for funnel progression
